SecurityComplianceRuleNames.WindowsScriptHostDisabled: Windows Script Host should be disabled
SecurityComplianceRuleNames.BackupServicesUnderLocalSystem: Backup services should be running under the LocalSystem account
SecurityComplianceRuleNames.OutdatedSslAndTlsDisabled: Deprecated versions of SSL and TLS should be disabled
SecurityComplianceRuleNames.ManualLinuxHostAuthentication: Unknown Linux servers should not be trusted automatically
SecurityComplianceRuleNames.CSmbSigningAndEncryptionEnabled: SMBv3 signing and encryption should be enabled
SecurityComplianceRuleNames.ViProxyTrafficEncrypted: Host to proxy traffic encryption should be enabled for the Network transport mode
SecurityComplianceRuleNames.JobsTargetingCloudRepositoriesEncrypted: Backup jobs to cloud repositories should use encryption
SecurityComplianceRuleNames.LLMNRDisabled: Link-Local Multicast Name Resolution (LLMNR) should be disabled
SecurityComplianceRuleNames.ImmutableOrOfflineMediaPresence: Immutable or offline (air gapped) media should be used
SecurityComplianceRuleNames.OsBucketsInComplianceMode: Compliance mode should be used for repositories with backup immutability enabled
SecurityComplianceRuleNames.BackupServerUpToDate: Latest software updates should be installed
SecurityComplianceRuleNames.BackupServerInProductionDomain: Backup server should not be a part of the production domain
SecurityComplianceRuleNames.ReverseIncrementalInUse: Reverse incremental backup mode is deprecated and should be avoided
SecurityComplianceRuleNames.WDigestNotStorePasswordsInMemory: WDigest credentials caching should be disabled
SecurityComplianceRuleNames.WebProxyAutoDiscoveryDisabled: Web Proxy Auto-Discovery service (WinHttpAutoProxySvc) should be disabled
SecurityComplianceRuleNames.ContainBackupCopies: All backups should have at least one copy (the 3-2-1 backup rule)
SecurityComplianceRuleNames.RemoteRegistryDisabled: Remote Registry service (RemoteRegistry) should be disabled
SecurityComplianceRuleNames.PasswordsRotation: Credentials and encryption passwords should be rotated at least annually
SecurityComplianceRuleNames.WinRmServiceDisabled: Windows Remote Management (WinRM) service should be disabled
SecurityComplianceRuleNames.MfaEnabledInBackupConsole: MFA for the backup console should be enabled
SecurityComplianceRuleNames.HardenedRepositorySshDisabled: Hardened repositories should have the SSH Server disabled
SecurityComplianceRuleNames.LinuxServersUsingSSHKeys: Linux servers should have password-based authentication disabled
SecurityComplianceRuleNames.RemoteDesktopServiceDisabled: Remote Desktop Service (TermService) should be disabled
SecurityComplianceRuleNames.ConfigurationBackupEnabledAndEncrypted: Configuration backup should be enabled and use encryption
SecurityComplianceRuleNames.HardenedRepositoryNotVirtual: Hardened repositories should not be hosted in virtual machines
SecurityComplianceRuleNames.ConfigurationBackupRepositoryNotLocal: The configuration backup must not be stored on the backup server
SecurityComplianceRuleNames.PostgreSqlUseRecommendedSettings: PostgreSQL server should be configured with recommended settings
SecurityComplianceRuleNames.LossProtectionEnabled: Password loss protection should be enabled
SecurityComplianceRuleNames.TrafficEncryptionEnabled: Network traffic encryption should be enabled in the backup network
SecurityComplianceRuleNames.NetBiosDisabled: NetBIOS protocol should be disabled on all network interfaces
SecurityComplianceRuleNames.HardenedRepositoryNotContainsNBDProxies: Hardened repositories should not be used as backup proxy servers due to expanded attack surface
SecurityComplianceRuleNames.LsassProtectedProcess: Local Security Authority Server Service (LSASS) should be set to run as a protected process
SecurityComplianceRuleNames.PasswordsComplexityRules: Backup encryption passwords should follow length and complexity recommendations
SecurityComplianceRuleNames.EncryptionPasswordsComplexityRules: Backup encryption passwords should follow length and complexity recommendations
SecurityComplianceRuleNames.CredentialsPasswordsComplexityRules: Saved credentials should follow password length and complexity recommendations
SecurityComplianceRuleNames.LinuxAuditBinariesOwnerIsRoot: Audit binaries should be owned by root
SecurityComplianceRuleNames.LinuxAuditdConfigured: Auditd should be enabled and configured to forward audit logs
SecurityComplianceRuleNames.LinuxDisableProblematicServices: Services with known security issues should be disabled
SecurityComplianceRuleNames.LinuxOsHasVaRandomization: Address space layout randomization (ASLR) should be used
SecurityComplianceRuleNames.LinuxOsIsFipsEnabled: OS should be in FIPS mode
SecurityComplianceRuleNames.LinuxOsUsesTcpSyncookies: OS should be configured to use TCP syncookies
SecurityComplianceRuleNames.LinuxUsePasswordPolicy: Password policy should be configured to enforce passwords length and complexity rules for local accounts
SecurityComplianceRuleNames.LinuxUseSecurityModule: System should use a security module
SecurityComplianceRuleNames.LinuxWorldDirectoriesPermissions: World-writable directories should not be executable
SecurityComplianceRuleNames.BackupServerHighAvailabilityEnabled: High Availability cluster should be configured for this backup server
